scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external @anthropic-ai/sdk --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external zod --minify
scripts.build:bundle: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --format esm --minify
scripts.build:bundle:debug: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --format esm
scripts.package: bun run build:bundle && bun run scripts/package-release.ts
scripts.package:debug: bun run build:bundle:debug && bun run scripts/package-release.ts
